message.content:
{
  "analysis": "We have 190 extracted frames at 1fps. OCR works, and samples show Zork prompt lines with commands like `>w`. The previous OCR inspection script was accidentally split by the terminal, but frames are present. We need inspect prompt patterns across the whole video, preferably save OCR text, and then extract moves. The next step is run a focused inspection script that OCRs all frames, saves text, and prints frames where prompt lines contain typed text.",
  "plan": "Create and run `/app/work/inspect_prompts.py` to OCR all frames, save OCR text to `/app/work/ocr/`, and print summarized prompt lines for frames with text after `>`. This will verify the command pattern and provide OCR files for later processing.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "cat > /app/work/inspect_prompts.py <<'PY'
from PIL import Image
import pytesseract, glob, os, re
fs=sorted(glob.glob('/app/work/frames/frame_*.png'))
os.makedirs('/app/work/ocr', exist_ok=True)
hits=0
for p in fs:
    im=Image.open(p)
    txt=pytesseract.image_to_string(im)
    open(p.replace('/frames/','/ocr/').replace('.png','.txt'),'w').write(txt)
    lines=[l.rstrip() for l in txt.splitlines() if l.strip()]
    prompts=[l for l in lines if l.lstrip().startswith('>')]
    typed=[l for l in prompts if l.strip() != '>']
    if typed:
        hits+=1
        print(os.path.basename(p), 'PROMPT_LINES:', ' || '.join(typed[-3:]))
print('frames_with_typed_prompt', hits)
PY
python3 /app/work/inspect_prompts.py > /app/work/logs/prompt_hits.log 2>&1
wc -l /app/work/logs/prompt_hits.log
sed -n '1,220p' /app/work/logs/prompt_hits.log
",
      "duration": 20.0
    }
  ]
}
